item.title: I am at pains to remind everyone that this is not me saying criticism of modern art is bad but that criticism of modern art is o...
item.description:
I am at pains to remind everyone that this is not me saying criticism of modern art is bad but that criticism of modern art is often used or promoted for bad reasons and fits into a bad idea ideology



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Can you imagine never having to deal with military recruiters ever again because they got booed out of any school they went into...
item.description:
Can you imagine never having to deal with military recruiters ever again because they got booed out of any school they went into? I got homophobiad by a military recruiter, my little gay self in the south would love to never see them into our school ever again



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I understand that she has good media literacy she is just wrong- the Met Gala is in fact one of the best examples of bourgeois d...
item.description:
I understand that she has good media literacy she is just wrong- the Met Gala is in fact one of the best examples of bourgeois decadence#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: I understand that when you get billionaire money, you ceased to be embarrassed
item.description:
I understand that when you get billionaire money, you ceased to be embarrassed. That is the Bari Weiss effect, oh my goodness I’m actually baffled that you can find people to show face when you’re this#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: If you don’t take into context to the imperial hegemony, you are enabling it
item.description:
If you don’t take into context to the imperial hegemony, you are enabling it. It really is that simple and if you failed to recognise the proxy states of that empire, you are not protecting them you are enabling them



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
